vocab.meaning: những thứ thiết yếu tối thiểu
vocab.example: I tend to travel light, so I usually just carry the bare necessities like my keys, phone, and wallet.
Given how much I rely on navigation apps, a compact portable charger is a permanent fixture in my bag.

vocab.meaning: gọn gàng, không có đồ đạc thừa thãi
vocab.example: I make a conscious effort to keep my pockets clutter-free by regularly clearing out old receipts and miscellaneous scraps.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng lỉnh kỉnh hàng ngày
vocab.example: My backpack is usually filled with my daily paraphernalia, ranging from stationery to a reusable water bottle.

vocab.meaning: cất gọn, để vào một nơi an toàn
vocab.example: I always make sure my valuables are securely stowed away in an inner zipped compartment to deter pickpockets.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng phù hợp với thời tiết
vocab.example: Since the weather here is quite temperamental, I often carry weather-appropriate gear like a sturdy folding umbrella.

vocab.meaning: bộ đồ dùng chăm sóc cá nhân (lược, gương, v.v.)
vocab.example: I usually keep a miniature grooming kit in my car for any last-minute touch-ups before a business meeting.

vocab.meaning: một điều kiện tiên quyết (thứ bắt buộc phải có)
vocab.example: Having a pair of high-quality sunglasses is an absolute prerequisite for me before heading out in this scorching heat.
I am a big fan of multi-purpose items, such as a phone case that doubles as a cardholder, to save space.

vocab.meaning: được gài vào/đút vào một cách gọn gàng
vocab.example: I keep my emergency cash tucked into a hidden sleeve in my wallet for peace of mind.
